taiChiPromo.title: Nurture your health with safe and low-impact Tai Chi workouts!
taiChiPromo.body: Our Tai Chi workouts focus on body awareness and gentle movements. They are a safer alternative to high-impact workouts for those prone to injuries or joint discomfort.

energyBalance.title: Not a problem! We'll balance your energy levels
energyBalance.subtitle: Weekly energy level with walking
energyBalance.diagramAlt: Energy diagram: intensity curve with high intensity at the peak
energyBalance.body1: Our fun and engaging workouts enhance overall body mobility, gently activate your muscles, and charge you for the day!
energyBalance.body2: Pump up your energy, stamina, and mood to enjoy every moment of your life!

sleep.title: How much sleep do you usually get?

sleep.femaleAlt: Woman stretching in bed after waking up

walkFreq.title: How often do you go for walks?

taiChiInfo.title: Tai Chi Walking: just as effective as high-impact workouts
taiChiInfo.p1a: People often think walking is less effective than high-impact workouts like running.
taiChiInfo.p1e: can be a powerful way to boost your fitness
taiChiInfo.source: Source: 'Walking for Exercise' Harvard Nutrition Source
taiChiInfo.maleImgAlt: Smiling man with arms raised, fitness and well-being
taiChiInfo.femaleImgAlt: Smiling woman with yoga mat and water bottle

lifestyleUpgrade.title: Designed to upgrade your life

transformation.lilyQuote: This app turned my walks into real progress. I'm seeing the difference on the scale and in my mood!
transformation.noahQuote: I've lost weight without even realizing it - just by walking daily with this app. It actually made fitness fun for once.

longTerm.title: We help you achieve long-term results
longTerm.drQuote: Dr Nick Smeeton from Stanford University
longTerm.drQuoteBody: reported that Tai Chi walking reduces fatigue, improves emotional state, and is less taxing on the body than exhausting gym workouts.

giveUp.title: Why do people give up on their get-in-shape efforts?
giveUp.line2: is starting too big too quickly.
giveUp.body: That's why our program aims to help you make sustainable lifestyle changes so you can transform your body and enjoy thriving health for life.
